documentStructure.description: Project overview, legal basis, investment objectives, scale, location, funding

documentStructure.section: Part II Section I - Hardware/Network Deployment
documentStructure.description: Network topology, firewall, switches, servers (app, DB, GIS, SIEM, proxy), SAN storage, UPS, cabling, IP planning, rack layout

documentStructure.section: Part II Section II - Internal Software Design
documentStructure.description: Full software architecture, functional modules, non-functional requirements, business processes

modules.name: User Management (Quản lý người dùng)
modules.description: User account management, registration, login, logout, password reset

modules.name: System Administration (Quản trị hệ thống)
modules.description: Unit management, interconnections, admin accounts, approval, lock/unlock, permission assignment, audit log

modules.name: Technical Parameters Management (Quản lý thông số kỹ thuật KCHTGTHH)
modules.description: Dashboard, technical parameter lookup, CRUD infrastructure data, approval workflow (Port Authority -> Dept Lead -> Cục), document attachment, map preview, history

modules.name: Operations & Maintenance Management (Quản lý vận hành khai thác, bảo trì)
modules.description: Operational plans, maintenance plans, incident management, document attachment, history tracking

modules.name: Planning Management (Quản lý quy hoạch KCHTGTHH)
modules.description: Port terminal planning, CRUD planning entries, planning schedule updates

modules.name: Asset Management (Quản lý tài sản KCHTGTHH)
modules.description: Asset lifecycle: addition, depreciation, disposal, revaluation, amortization tracking, inventory, exploitation

modules.name: GIS/Map-based Infrastructure Management (Quản lý KCHT trên nền bản đồ)
modules.description: Point/line/polygon object management on map, CRUD spatial objects, attribute updates, list/detail views

modules.name: Reporting & Statistics (Báo cáo thống kê)
modules.description: Asset reports, infrastructure reports, port throughput, safety reports, multi-condition filtering, PDF/Excel export, detail drill-down

modules.name: Data Interconnection & Sharing (Liên thông chia sẻ dữ liệu)
modules.description: LGSP integration, NDXP (National Data Exchange Platform), Web API, data sharing with MOT shared DB, external query services

documentStructure.section: Part II Section III - Nautical Chart Editing & Database Creation
documentStructure.description: Electronic nautical chart editing, GIS integration, spatial DB creation, data conversion, S-57/S-100 standards, data digitization

modules.name: Nautical Chart Editing (Biên tập hải đồ điện tử)
modules.description: Chart editing, S-57/S-100 standard compliance, GIS integration, data conversion, spatial database building, UI development

modules.name: Infrastructure Database Creation (Tạo lập CSDL KCHTGTHH)
modules.description: Mass data digitization of maritime infrastructure documents (~2000+ records), data field mapping, document scanning/vectorization

documentStructure.section: Part II Section IV - Training & Handover
documentStructure.description: User training, system administration training, warranty, maintenance, technical support

documentStructure.section: Part II Section V - Compliance Assessment
documentStructure.description: Alignment with national IT strategy, e-government framework, MOT digital transformation

documentStructure.section: Part II Section VI - Information Security Plan
documentStructure.description: Security Level 3 compliance: network security, server security, application security, data security, encryption, audit logging, backup

documentStructure.section: Part II Section VII - Implementation Plan & Budget
documentStructure.description: Deployment schedule (2024-2025), cost estimates by line item (software: ~10.7B VND, hardware: ~7.6B VND)
Complete functional requirements table with 1978 rows across all modules, classified by input/output/query types

documentStructure.description: Detailed DB field definitions for all infrastructure types (ports, berths, channels, anchorages, buoys, lighthouses, dikes), asset management fields for 3 entities (North, South, VISHIPEL)

supplementarySources.role: User requirements - supplements NFRs, business rules, and acceptance criteria
Detailed design - supplements architecture, DB schemas, API contracts, screen mockups
Survey/study - context for business processes, data classifications, operational constraints
Survey appendix - 964 pages of raw appendices (forms, templates, questionnaire results)
